recommendations.title: The Crossing Guard
recommendations.overview: Unable to move on from the loss of his daughter, Freddy, now a shell of the person he was before, swears to kill the man responsible for her death.

recommendations.title: Into the Wild
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Emory University in 1992, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity, and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

recommendations.title: Flag Day
recommendations.overview: A father lives a double life as a counterfeiter, bank robber and con man in order to provide for his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Pledge
recommendations.overview: A police chief, about to retire, pledges to help a woman find her daughter's killer.

recommendations.title: The Last Face
recommendations.overview: Miguel, a heroic Spanish doctor, puts himself in harm's way to deliver medical treatment to the victims of military uprisings in Africa.

recommendations.title: Carlito's Way
recommendations.overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

recommendations.title: The Assassination of Richard Nixon
recommendations.overview: It’s 1974 and Sam Bicke has lost everything. His wife leaves him with his three kids, his boss fires him, his brother turns away from him, and the bank won’t give him any money to start anew. He tries to find someone to blame for his misfortunes and

recommendations.title: Daddio
recommendations.overview: A woman taking a cab ride from JFK airport engages in a conversation with the driver about the important relationships in their lives.

recommendations.title: Like Stars on Earth
recommendations.overview: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don't seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness.

recommendations.title: Dead Man Walking
recommendations.overview: A death row inmate turns for spiritual guidance to a local nun in the days leading up to his scheduled execution for the murders of a young couple.
